docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BURNS, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURNS, LINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $60.00) SERVED FEB-14-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CITIBANK, N.A.
